summary: Completed comprehensive testing of 7 new features for InsureHub insurance portal. All backend APIs (25/25 tests passed) and frontend UI components working correctly.
passed_tests: Admin login successful
HR login successful
GET /api/cd-ledger - Admin can view CD Ledger entries with running balance
GET /api/cd-ledger - HR can view CD Ledger entries
POST /api/cd-ledger - Admin can add manual CD entry
POST /api/cd-ledger - HR forbidden (403) from adding entries
DELETE /api/cd-ledger/{id} - Admin can delete manual entries
DELETE /api/cd-ledger/{id} - HR forbidden (403) from deleting
CD Ledger running balance calculated correctly
GET /api/endorsements/import-batches - Admin can view import batches
GET /api/endorsements/import-batches - HR can view import batches
GET /api/endorsements/batch/{id} - Batch detail returns endorsements
GET /api/endorsements/batch/{id}/download - Excel download works
GET /api/endorsements/batch/{id}/download - 404 for non-existent batch
POST /api/endorsements/preview - Endpoint exists (422 without file)
POST /api/endorsements/preview - Rejects non-Excel files (400)
POST /api/endorsements - Valid DOJ (30 days ago) accepted
POST /api/endorsements - DOJ > 45 days backdated rejected (400)
POST /api/endorsements - DOL > 45 days backdated rejected (400)
Addition endorsement has positive prorata premium (charge)
Deletion endorsement has negative prorata premium (refund)
Correction endorsement has zero prorata premium
Midterm addition has positive prorata premium
Endorsement response includes annual_premium_per_life field
Approval creates CD Ledger entry for premium deduction
Frontend: DOB→Age auto-calculation works (1990-06-15 → 35)
Frontend: Addition type shows DOJ field with min date 45 days ago
Frontend: Deletion type shows DOL field with min date 45 days ago
Frontend: Midterm addition shows DOJ field
Frontend: Midterm addition hides Employee from relationship dropdown
Frontend: Warning 'Employee not allowed for Midterm Addition' shown
Frontend: Premium info displayed when policy selected
Frontend: CD Ledger page shows balance cards (CD Balance, Total Deposits, Total Deductions)
Frontend: CD Ledger Add Entry form works
Frontend: CD Ledger table shows running balance
Frontend: Import Batches page loads in Admin dashboard
Frontend: HR Import Excel has Preview & Review button
Frontend: AllEndorsements table has Annual Premium and Pro-rata Premium columns
Frontend: ApproveEndorsements table has Annual Premium and Pro-rata columns
seed_data_creation: Test endorsements and CD Ledger entries created during testing (cleaned up)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 7 new features tested and working: (1) Admin Import Batches view/download, (2) HR Excel Preview before import, (3) DOB→Age auto-calculation, (4) Dynamic DOJ/DOL fields based on endorsement type, (5) 45-day backdating validation, (6) CD Ledger with manual entries and auto-deduction on approval, (7) Prorata premium with sign convention (Addition=positive, Deletion=negative). CD Ledger has test entries from pytest. Import batches may be empty if no HR has imported Excel yet.

feature_1_import_batches.details: Admin can view, detail, and download HR-imported Excel batches

feature_2_excel_preview.details: HR can preview Excel data before final import submission

feature_3_auto_age.details: Age auto-calculated from DOB in Submit Endorsement form

feature_4_dynamic_fields.details: DOJ shown for Addition/Midterm, DOL for Deletion, Employee hidden for Midterm

feature_5_backdating_lock.details: 45-day backdating validation on DOJ/DOL (frontend min attr + backend 400 error)

feature_6_cd_ledger.details: CD Ledger with balance cards, manual entries (Admin only), running balance

feature_7_prorata_premium.details: Addition=positive charge, Deletion=negative refund, Correction=zero, auto-deduct on approval
